notes: v1.14.86 - Redesign nav-chrome fix: the #mode-toggle (Command/Work/Ref) strip was position:sticky;top:8px;z-60, so on a scrolled page it floated over the active page's own sub-tab strip (e.g. Reference's Optics/Hardware/CLI-IB/HW Ref/Know) and the labels collided. Made #mode-toggle position:relative (scrolls with the page) so the two strips stack instead of overlapping. One inline-style edit; base .subtab-strip untouched, so the field app's sub-tabs are unaffected. (Handoff was authored against v1.14.84 targeting v1.14.85, but v1.14.85 already shipped the Optics re-home on a parallel build line - reconciled to v1.14.86.)
